title: Lesson 6
paragraph: At the training center, attendance is checked before each class. Students read the instruction sheet, fill in a form, and save every document in a folder. The teacher writes a short note about each student, checks the equipment and supply box, and talks about any trouble. A good relationship in class helps everyone enjoy a variety of tasks.

words.meaning: the act of being present at a class, meeting, or event
words.example: Attendance is important because the class meets only once a week.

words.meaning: a paper or computer file with written information
words.example: Please sign the document before you leave the office.

words.meaning: the tools or machines needed for a job or activity
words.example: The sports club bought new equipment for the gym.

words.meaning: a paper or online page where you write information
words.example: I wrote my phone number on the form.

words.meaning: information that tells you how to do something
words.example: The instruction on the box says to add hot water.

words.meaning: a short piece of writing used to remember or tell something
words.example: She left a note on the kitchen table.

words.meaning: an amount of something that is ready to be used
words.example: The school keeps a supply of paper in the office.

words.meaning: the way two people or groups are connected
words.example: A good relationship with classmates makes group work easier.
Call me if you have trouble with the new printer.

words.meaning: a number of different types of things
words.japaneseMeaning: 多様性、さまざまな種類
words.example: The store sells a variety of fresh fruit.
